nodes.name: 01-creative-assets.md
nodes.summary: Detailed functional design for the Creative Asset Center module, covering digital asset import (images, video, audio, documents), metadata extraction, thumbnail generation, folder-based batch import, versioning, and tagging for illustrators and AIGC artists.

nodes.name: 02-rights-protection.md
nodes.summary: Detailed functional design for the Rights Protection Center covering SHA-256 notarization, blockchain anchoring via multiple platforms (Banquanjia, AntChain, ZhixinChain), PDF certificate generation, and image-infringement monitoring via Baidu and Google Vision.

nodes.name: 03-ip-registration.md
nodes.summary: Functional design for the IP Registration workstation providing multi-jurisdiction IP filing guidance, AI-assisted form pre-fill, Nice classification recommendations with confidence scores, fee calculator, and mandatory lawyer-review gate for CNIPA submissions.

nodes.name: 04-monetization-engine.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive design for the Monetization Engine with a four-layer architecture (Design -> Template -> Listing -> Publication) covering POD channel management, crowdfunding, IP licensing, and revenue tracking for illustrators and AIGC artists.

nodes.name: 05-content-distribution.md
nodes.summary: Functional design for the Content Distribution Center covering multi-platform publishing (Xiaohongshu, Weibo, Bilibili, Instagram, etc.), AI copywriting generation, image processing, scheduled publishing, influence analytics, and original-creation verified badges.

nodes.name: 06-business-management.md
nodes.summary: Functional design for the Business Management Center aggregating income tracking, partner management, order management, notification center, and data analytics dashboards across all OriStudio business modules.

nodes.name: 07-system-infra.md
nodes.summary: Infrastructure layer design covering unified dictionary data center, onboarding wizard, disclaimer management, multi-platform authentication (local, Google, WeChat), file storage strategy, backup and restore, system health monitoring, audit logging, and plugin extension framework.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Index document for OriStudio v3 module designs, listing all seven module documents with implementation status, API endpoint counts totaling 232 endpoints, and key design decisions for Stage 2.
